Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a complex scenario and we need to model it as a POWL model

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process starts by verifying the service request SR Once the request is verified Then the Contract Setup CS must be done which is a prerequisite for technical configuration

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After SR we have CS Then we have two tasks in parallel DA and ACI

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After DA and ACI are both completed we have a loop BNC followed by an optional DR which is a loop until stable The loop is defined as Execute A BNC then either exit or execute B DR and then A again So the loop node is BNC DR

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After the loop we have a choice between CD and MD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the choice we have QA and SA two Transitions no order between them and then GLA Transition label Go Live Approval

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We have to decide the overall structure The entire process is a partial order of the following nodes SR CS DA ACI The loop OperatorPOWL The choice OperatorPOWL QA SA GLA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The order constraints are SR to CS CS to DA and CS to ACI DA and ACI must both be completed before the loop starts So we have DA to loop and ACI to loop The loop must be completed before the choice loop to xor The choice must be completed before QA and SA xor to QA and xor to SA QA and SA must both be completed before GLA QA to GLA and SA to GLA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that DA and ACI are independent so we do not add an edge between them Also note that the loop node is a single node that represents the entire loop Similarly the xor node is a single node

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will create sr cs da aci bnc dr cd md qa sa gla as transitions loop as OperatorPOWL with LOOP and children bnc dr xor as OperatorPOWL with XOR and children cd md Then we create a StrictPartialOrder for the entire process

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Note We do not need a silent transition in this scenario because all steps are visible
